name: Spinach-Feta-Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Chopped fresh dill or 2 teaspoons dried dill
1 package Frozen leaf spinach, thawed and squeezed out
4 ounces Feta cheese, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Set a coffee filter or double thickness of paper towel in a strainer over a small bowl.
2. Spoon the yogurt into the filter.
3. Refrigerate; drain for 2 hours.
4. Chop the garlic and dill in a food processor.
5. Add the spinach, feta, lemon rind, salt, and pepper.
6. Whirl until the cheese is finely grated, scraping down the side of the bowl as needed.
7. Add the drained yogurt.
8. Pulse with on/off motion just until the mixture is combined.
9. Scrape into a serving bowl.
(can be prepared up to 24 hours ahead and refrigerated.)
